message:
Minor fixes: useLocalStorage null handling, code fence regex, React keys

- useLocalStorage: Use hasLatestValueRef flag instead of null check to handle
  values that could legitimately be null
- message-content: Fix code fence regex to allow non-word chars in language
  (e.g., c++, objective-c)
- StaggerChildren: Add proper React keys to mapped children

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
